info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Subscriber Management API
info.description: The Subscriber Management API enables businesses to efficiently manage subscriber registrations and updates. This API supports operations for adding new subscribers, modifying their details, and ensuring accurate tracking of subscriber information. Common use cases include onboarding new users to a newsletter or service, handling subscription preferences, and maintaining up-to-date records for marketing or communication purposes. Ideal for developers integrating with customer relationship management systems or email marketing platforms.

post.summary: Create a new subscriber for a customer.
post.description: This endpoint allows the creation of a new subscriber associated with a specific customer. Provide the necessary details in the request body to successfully add the subscriber.

requestBody.description: This request body is used to create new subscriber entries for customers. It must contain the appropriate fields as defined in the schema to ensure the successful creation of a subscriber.

500.description: An unexpected error occurred on the server.

404.description: The specified resource was not found.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createCustomerSubscribe.title: Error Response for Subscriber Operations

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: The status indicating whether the error response is for a failed operation.

error.description: A short description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message describing the error.
message.example: Unable to process subscriber activation request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the endpoint that encountered the error.

trace.description: The trace of the error for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggested action to take in response to the error.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createCustomerSubscribe.description: This schema represents the error response returned when a POST request on subscribers operations fails.

example.message: Unable to process subscriber activation request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database connection timeout while saving subscriber details.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createCustomerSubscribe.title: Error Details

customerId.description: The ID of the customer associated with the error.

errorCode.description: A specific error code that identifies the issue.

message.description: A detailed message related to the error.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createCustomerSubscribe.description: This schema provides additional context about the error that occurred.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createCustomerSubscribe.title: Subscriber Details Response

subscriberId.description: The unique identifier for the subscriber.

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer associated with the subscriber.

msisdn.description: The Mobile Station International Subscriber Directory Number (MSISDN) for the subscriber.

plan.description: The subscription plan associated with the subscriber.

network.description: The network provider for the subscriber.

status.description: The current status of the subscriber (e.g., active, inactive).

message.description: A message providing additional information about the subscriber status or response.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createCustomerSubscribe.description: This schema represents the response structure for the successful creation of a subscriber.

customerId.description: The unique identifier for the customer.

msisdn.description: The mobile station international subscriber directory number.

firstName.description: The first name of the customer.

lastName.description: The last name of the customer.

plan.description: The plan type that the customer is subscribed to.

network.description: The network provider associated with the customer's subscription.

activationDate.description: The date on which the subscription was activated.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createCustomerSubscribe.description: Request body for creating a new customer subscriber in the system.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createCustomerSubscribe.title: Error Response for Subscriber Creation

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the operation was successful or not.

error.description: A short description of the error that occurred.

message.description: A more detailed error message explaining what went wrong.
message.example: Customer details not found for subscriber activation.

path.description: The request path that was attempted.

trace.description: A trace of the error, if available, for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for resolving the error, if applicable.
suggestion.example: Verify customer information and retry the request.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createCustomerSubscribe.description: This schema represents the structure of the error response when a 404 error occurs during the POST operation for creating subscribers.

example.message: Customer details not found for subscriber activation.

details.message: No registered customer profile exists for the provided customer ID.

example.suggestion: Verify customer information and retry the request.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
